scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/schemas typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/http-client typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/admin typecheck
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/schemas build && bun run --cwd packages/http-client build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/admin build
scripts.check: bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run build
